problem.title: NDT throughput and accuracy trade-off on KITTI Raw drive 0009 (200 frames, urban)
problem.question: Which NDT profile should stay as the current default on KITTI Raw drive 0009?

variants.label: Balanced local map
variants.intent: Keep the current repository default as the baseline trade-off.
variants.note: Uses GT-seeded scan-to-map initialization with weak-update fallback in this dogfooding tool.
variants.readability_note: Uses the default CLI surface only.
variants.extensibility_note: No extra profile knobs beyond the stable core contract.
variants.decision_reason: Close enough to the current default to keep as a live alternative.

variants.label: Fast coarse map
variants.intent: Use a coarser map and fewer points to increase FPS.
variants.note: Uses GT-seeded scan-to-map initialization with weak-update fallback in this dogfooding tool.
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Best combined benchmark score on the shared dataset and interface.

variants.label: Dense local map
variants.intent: Use denser scans and a larger map budget for a stronger refinement path.
variants.note: Uses GT-seeded scan-to-map initialization with weak-update fallback in this dogfooding tool.
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Useful for comparison, but not strong enough to replace the current default.
